chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI Constitutional Petition No. D – 3938 of 2023 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGES Disposed of matter: For hearing of CMA No.16629/2025 (Return of Surety) 04.09.2025 Mr. M. Adnan Moton, Advocate for the Petitioner. Mr. Aamir Ali Shaikh, Advocate for the Respondent No.2. Mr. Muhammad Akbar Khan, Asstt. Attorney General -------------------------------------- Mr. Aaamir Ali Shaikh, has filed his vakalatnama on behalf of the respondent No.2, which is taken on record. Instant petition was disposed of vide order dated 25.08.2023. Pursuant to the order dated 18.08.2023, the Petitioner deposited the disputed amount before the Nazir of this Court. Thereafter, pursuant to decision dated 21.11.2024 in Customs Appeal No.K- 2403/2024 the dispute has been resolved in favour of the petitioner. Learned counsel appearing on behalf of the respondent No.2 has accorded his no objection to the grant of listed application. Accordingly, the application is allowed as prayed. Nazir is directed to release the amount deposited pursuant to order dated 18.08.2023 along with any profit accumulated thereon, subject to deposit of certificate(s) by the petitioner. JUDGE JUDGE Nadeem
